title: Fixed-Sparsity Matrix Approximation from Matrix-Vector Products
description: Presented [our work](/publication/2024-fixedsparsity-matrix-approximation-from-matrixvector) on sparse matrix recovery at this [annual meeting](https://math.temple.edu/events/conferences/na-day/).

title: The Low-Rank Bottleneck in Attention
venue: New York Academy of Sciences Annual Machine Learning Symposium
description: Presented [our work](/publication/2025-the-lowrank-bottleneck-in-attention) on attention rank at this [annual meeting](https://events.nyas.org/event/ml2024/summary).

title: Fixed-Sparsity Matrix Approximation from Matrix-Vector Products
description: Presented [our work](/publication/2024-fixedsparsity-matrix-approximation-from-matrixvector) on sparse matrix recovery at this [annual linear alegbra conference](https://www.siam.org/conferences-events/past-event-archive/la24/).

title: Near-Optimal Approximation of Matrix Functions by the Lanczos Method
description: Presented [our work](/publication/2024-nearly-optimal-approximation-of-matrix) on the Lanczos method for rational functions of a matrix at the first [annual meeting](https://sites.google.com/view/siam-nynjpa/annual-meeting/) of our SIAM section, in Newark.

title: Lanczos-FA is Nearly Krylov-Optimal for Rational Functions
venue: \"Modern Applied and Computational Analysis\" / \"Synergistic Interactions between Theory and Computation\" / \"Mihalis Fest\"
description: Presented [our work](/publication/2024-nearly-optimal-approximation-of-matrix) on the Lanczos method for rational functions of a matrix at three birthday conferences. Poster [here](/files/icerm_poster.pdf). More on the conferences [here](https://icerm.brown.edu/topical_workshops/tw-23-maca/), [here](https://math.mit.edu/events/ase60celebration/), and [here](https://mihalisfest.cs.columbia.edu).

title: Computing Bottleneck Structures at Scale
venue: IEEE/ACM INDIS 2020 at SC20 (7th International Workshop on Innovating the Network for Data Intensive Science)
description: Presented our paper [Computing Bottleneck Structures at Scale](/publication/2020-computing-bottleneck-structures-at-scale). Slides [here](https://scinet.supercomputing.org/community/documents/110/INDIS20_PaperTalk_BottleneckStructures.pdf). More on the conference [here](https://scinet.supercomputing.org/community/indis/previous-editions/sc20-indis/).

title: Designing Data Center Networks Using Bottleneck Structures
description:
Presented our paper, [Designing Data Center Networks Using Bottleneck Structures](/publication/2021-designing-data-center-networks-using) at Sigcomm.

title: A Spectral Method for Improved Phylogenetic Inference
description: Presented work on phylogenetic inference completed during the Kupcinet-Getz international summer school, which eventually became our paper [Spectral Neighbor Joining for Reconstruction of Latent Tree Models](/publication/2021-spectral-neighbor-joining-for-reconstruction).
